sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42868" key="e)rwtoploe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐρωτο-πλοέω</orth>, <sense id="n42868.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sail on love's ocean,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1492.tlg001:5:155" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.155</biblScope> </bibl>(Id.).</sense> </entryFree>
